title: Brycen's PvP Textures
description: A simple PvP Resource Pack that includes features like short swords and simplified HUD that enhance the Player VS. Player experience.
body:
# A Resource Pack by BrycenPro15...
![Uh oh...! An image of the title was supposed to show here... Maybe check the gallery?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9556cd9a9fcb593193d55ba8b859c2dceb4e1ad.png)

[Check out all of my other creations on Modrinth!](https://modrinth.com/user/BrycenPro15)
## Overview

Enhancing combat-related gameplay by adding features to improve visuals, such as short swords, simplified HUD, and even more, while still looking like vanilla.

### Supported Versions
Most Popular Supported Versions: [1.21.11 ✓] [1.8.9 **<!>**]

Coming Soon: [1.16.5] [1.20.1] [26.1/26.1.1]

(nerd alert) Supported pack_formats: [1] [75]

This pack does not support any custom weapons added from any mods/datapacks (yet).
## Key Features
### What's included:
- Short swords (Copper and Netherite variants included)
- Simplified HUD
- Readable mining progress

### What's not in this pack (and will never be):
- Low fire
- Custom sounds, animations, or anything else besides changing textures.

## Additional Info
### Hopefully coming soon:
- Transparent container GUI (crafting table, chest, etc)
- Miniature PvP Utilities/Food and Short Mace
- Support for Tiny Takeover (26.1/26.1.1) and hopefully Chaos Cubed (26.2?) when it releases. I'll try my best to update Brycen's PvP Textures to the latest version when possible.
### Version Number Explained
Example: **beta1.0-75**

Explanation:

[**beta**] is what kind of release it is, in this example it is a beta.

[**1.0**] is the project version, in this demonstration it is 1.0.

[**75**] is the pack_format of the resource pack located in the pack.mcmeta file, if you need to know the Minecraft version, either search up the pack_format, or check the version subtitle. It's really just nerdy stuff, so it shouldn't be a big deal unless you plan to modify the pack to support other versions or anything else.

### Extremely EXTRA info

Texture pack made with Blockbench

I don't really care how you use this pack, whether it's to put it in your modpack, or just to modify it for your personal use, this was made entirely for fun. I don't like to deal with theives. But please don't copy me/use my textures, it's not nice :)

Click [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Creating_a_resource_pack) for more info on resource packs, or [here](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tutorial:Loading_a_resource_pack) for help on activating it in-game if it doesn't work. (MC Wiki)
